violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Floor fan in dish washing area noted with debris build up on blade guard.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Filters for hood vent above flat top noted not clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Bar tap shelf behind bar is constructed of an absorbent material and is not properly sealed.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the ware-washing area are in need of repair. Floor planks are missing in varous areas. Walls and door frames near the pizza oven area are not easily cleanable. Exposed door framing and absorbent wall material are not properly sealed.

inspections.comments: As a reminder use these guidelines for proper cooling of food items. Potentially hazardous food must be cooled from 140?F to 70?F within 2 hours and from 70?F to 41?F or below with 4 hours.

violations.description: TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Single door reach-in cooler next to pizza prep cooler noted with no thermometer.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the ware-washing area noted needs repair. Laminate plank flooring is need of repair near and around ware washing maching. Floors in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning. Grease and debris build up in main kitchen area around prep top coolers and under flat tops. Vent covers in kitchen noted not clean and missing above the pizza oven.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): The tap handle shelf under the bar area is constructed of an absorbant material.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): The kitchen floor fan guards noted not clean.
